nhi_verdict.evidence_type: behavioral, statistical (n=3 per cell, 48 runs total)

schema_change_notes: v2 splits substrate vs NHI verdict per docs/governance.md §1 (Principle 1: two truth-claims, two evidence streams, never conflated).

v1 had a single `campaign.verdict` field that collapsed substrate + NHI evidence; v2 separates them into `substrate_verdict` (Phase 1, S1–S24, binary/reproducible) and `nhi_verdict` (Phase 3, behavioral, statistical).
Reader convention: use `substrate_verdict` for ship/no-ship gating; use `nhi_verdict` to assess utility delta of ai-memory under realistic agent workloads.

`version` + `verdict` at top level are flat shims for the existing release-summary-gate.yml workflow; they mirror `subject.tag` and a derived collapse of substrate+nhi (pass iff substrate ∈ {PASS, 'PARTIAL — pending Patch 2'} AND nhi=PASS, else fail/pending).

2026-05-04 (truthful audit): cert standard per operator directive is '3 consecutive runs at 100% pass' (overall_pass=true with 0 failed scenarios). Audit of every run's a2a-summary.json: OpenClaw r1/r2/r3 = 3/3 at 100%; IronClaw r25/r26/r27 = 0/3 at 100% (each had 5-6 failed scenarios); Hermes r12/r15/r16 = 0/3 at 100% (each had 5 failed scenarios). The OpenClaw cell is the only one that satisfies the standard. IronClaw + Hermes failed scenarios are concentrated on v0.6.3.1-NEW S-prefixed (S25/S26/S28/S29/S30) which are known gaps scheduled for Patch 2 (v0.6.3.2). Per Principle 1 the per-scenario truth lives in substrate_verdict.matrix (PENDING for ironclaw_* and hermes_* cells); top-level verdict is the derived collapse for the macro and release-summary-gate workflow. Earlier 2026-05-04 entries claiming all-three-cells-pass have been superseded by this entry.

expected_red_rationale.S23: Issue #507 — ~/-prefixed config.toml `db` field does not expand to $HOME. Fix scheduled for v0.6.3.2.
expected_red_rationale.S24: Issue #318 — MCP stdio tool dispatch writes bypass federation fanout. Fix scheduled for v0.6.3.2.

wall_human: OpenClaw cert green; IronClaw + Hermes pending Patch 2
headline: v0.6.3.1 — OpenClaw substrate cert GREEN: 3 of 3 runs at 100% pass (105 / 105 scenarios). IronClaw + Hermes campaigns ran 3 each but did NOT achieve 100% pass on any — v0.6.3.1-NEW S-prefixed scenarios (S25 / S26 / S28 / S29 / S30) RED on every run. Carry-forward to Patch 2 (v0.6.3.2). Per-scenario detail in substrate_verdict.matrix.

cells.cell: openclaw / off / local-docker — 3 of 3 at 100% pass (r1/r2/r3)
cells.notes: Cert criterion satisfied: 3 consecutive runs at 100% scenario pass (35/35 each, 0 failure reasons). overall_pass=true on every run. Workstation 16 GB/container Docker mesh, xAI Grok 4.3, ai-memory 0.6.3+patch.1.

Cert criterion NOT satisfied: every run had 5-6 failed scenarios. overall_pass=false on r25 (5 fail), r26 (5 fail), r27 (6 fail incl. S40 flake). Failures concentrated on v0.6.3.1-NEW S-prefixed (S25 audit chain, S26 tamper detect, S28 agent_id immutability on import, S29 namespace standards endpoints, S30 inbox/webhook fanout) — known v0.6.3.1 gaps; carry-forward to Patch 2 (v0.6.3.2). Testbook v3.0.0 numerical subset DID pass on every run.

Cert criterion NOT satisfied: every run had 5 failed scenarios. overall_pass=false on every run. Same v0.6.3.1-NEW S-prefixed RED set as IronClaw — framework-agnostic gap pattern. Testbook v3.0.0 numerical subset DID pass on every run. Carry-forward to Patch 2.
